result.name: Zyra the Shadowed
result.description: Zyra moves with a grace that belies her small stature, her dark cloak blending seamlessly into the shadows of the alleyways. Her bright yellow eyes glint with mischief and intelligence, hinting at a life spent navigating the dangers of urban life. With a quick wit and a penchant for thievery, she is both a valuable ally and a potential liability, always seeking the next thrill or treasure.

sections.name: Zyra the Shadowed
sections.motive: To gather secrets and treasures for her clan
sections.combat: Prefers ambush tactics, striking swiftly before retreating into the shadows
sections.interaction: Cunning and playful, she often uses charm to disarm potential threats
sections.use: Can serve as a guide through the underbelly of urban areas or as a source of information
sections.gm_intrusion: Zyra's playful nature may lead her to trick the players into a dangerous situation
sections.loot: Small trinkets, stolen goods, and local secrets
